title: Internal Type Masking
description: Utilize `package.json` "exports" and JSDoc `@internal` tags to control public API visibility. Implement type masking to hide complex internal type-level machinery from external library consumers.
objectives: Utilize `package.json` "exports" and JSDoc `@internal` tags to control public API visibility.
Implement type masking to hide complex internal type-level machinery from external library consumers.
